case_title: MUNGUIA, DINORA VS BEST COLLATERAL INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT BEST COLLATERAL INC. NO APPEARANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY MUNGUIA, DINORA AS TO DEFENDANT BEST COLLATERAL INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-15-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-15-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-20-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT WAIVED DEFECTIVE CERTIFIED MAIL.
CERT MAIL SENT TO ROBERT VERHOEFF RETURNED SIGNED.
